items.text:
**CASTING CALL- CHICHESTER BASED SHOOT **

Hello All!

I am a student at the University of Portsmouth, and I'm currently shooting a short film to shine a light on the abusive difficulties that ballet dancers face, including domestic abuse.** AND WE STILL NEED OUR CAROL!!** 

**Filming** **MID APRIL- please message for more information!!**

The synopsis is as follows:

In the winter of '08, a daughter returns to her childhood home, yet again trapped by her mother's aspirations, but this time, she has had enough.

Jane, a young adult, is about to finish one of the most prestigious dance schools in the UK. Returning home for the summer, she confronts her mother in a heartbreakingly raw encounter, where both bitter truths and suffocating affection finally meet.

This 5-minute short film will explore nostalgia, identity, sacrifice, acceptance, and family love.

sharedPost.text:
Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"

I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet.  But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there  to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men  25 to 36 years old,  good looking  who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.

items.text:
Hi!! I’m a Film Production student at the University of Salford and the director of ‘Lights Out,’ a short university film project🏎️

We’re inviting those interested to send in a short self tape audition - message me here or email @elliejackson1407@gmail.com and i’ll send over the script and more details✨

⭐️CHARACTER DESCRIPTIONS:

DAVID - A retired racing driver and devoted father who believes in Maya‘s talent, but not in motorsports ability to protect her. His protectiveness masks unresolved fear from a past racing accident and failed marriage. He hides behind his work as a mechanic, putting his relationship with his daughter at risk.

SUSIE - A successful racing driver leading a women’s motorsport initiative. Fierce and focused, Susie carries the pressure of representing women in a sport that is waiting for her to fail.

Please check the attached casting call for more information - we’d love to hear from you!✨

items.text:
ASAP🚨 Casting call for professional aerial gymnasts!
The most famous and big club in Jakarta (Indonesia) looking for a couple of aerial gymnasts (male and female or two female) 

2-3 shows per day (5 days per week)

Hotel accomodation (1 person/room)

1 meal per day included

Everyday transfer hotel - club, club - hotel

Club provides work visa and flight tickets 

The salary starts from 2000$ ( monthly payment), depends on materials of gymnasts. 

Knowledge of English will be an advantage!

Contract starts from 17th of March 2026

To participate in the casting performers should send current materials:

5-10 photos 

3-4 videos of performing 

Basic information (age, height, weight)

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL – No-Budget Comedy Spot (Manga-Style)**

**Arbeitstitel:** „Das Pizza-Finale“
**Drehort:** Köln
**Drehtermin:** 07.03.2026 (Samstag)
**Uhrzeit:** 14 Uhr
**Format:** Werbespot im Manga-/Anime-Stil
**Genre:** Comedy, situative Rivalität

Für einen humorvollen Werbespot suchen wir drei spielfreudige Darsteller:innen aus Köln mit starkem mimischem Ausdruck und sehr gutem Gespür für Timing.

Die Szene lebt von intensiven Blicken, inneren Monologen (V.O.) und überzeichneter „Battle“-Dramatik im Manga-Stil. Gesucht werden Persönlichkeiten, die Alltagssituationen mit epischer Ernsthaftigkeit spielen können.

**Logline:**

Ein harmloses Pizzaessen eskaliert komödiantisch zu einem stillen Wettkampf um das letzte Stück.

**🍕 JOHAN**

**Spielalter:** 20–35
**Typ:** Ehrgeiziger, leicht überambitionierter Typ mit Comedy-Talent
**Aussehen:** Blond, schlank, leicht nerdiger Look, kurze Haare, europäischer Typ. Gern Brillenträger.

**Charakter:**
Johan nimmt harmlose Situationen viel zu ernst. In seinem Kopf wird das letzte Pizzastück zum epischen Endkampf. Er ist analytisch, kompetitiv – aber auf sympathische, leicht überdrehte Weise.

**Anforderung:**
Starke Mimik (intensive Close-ups), gutes Timing für Voice-Over-Texte, körperliche Comedy (Speed-Eating, Blickduell).

**🍕 MARIO**

**Spielalter:** 30–45
**Typ:** Selbstbewusster, ruhiger Gegenspieler mit natürlicher Autorität
**Aussehen:** Kräftige oder leicht muskulöse Statur, schwarze Haare, asiatischer Typ

**Charakter:**
Mario ist der gelassene Stratege. Er sagt wenig, kommentiert aber innerlich alles im Voice-Over. Sein Humor ist trocken, sein Blick maximal ernst – zumindest in seiner eigenen Vorstellung.

**Anforderung:**
Starke Präsenz, subtile Komik, intensiver Blickkontakt. Fähigkeit, Überdramatisierung mit absoluter Ernsthaftigkeit zu spielen.

**🍕 KERSTIN**

**Spielalter:** 25–40
**Typ:** Smart, ruhig, fashion-bewusst – mit starkem Comedy-Instinkt
**Aussehen:** Schlank, eher klein, stilvoller Look, braune Haare; europäischer oder südamerikanischer Typ

**Charakter:**
Während die beiden Männer sich in ihrem inneren Endkampf verlieren, beobachtet Kerstin alles entspannt – nur um im perfekten Moment das letzte Stück zu nehmen. Sie ist die stille Siegerin.

**Anforderung:**
Natürliches Spiel, feines Timing, selbstbewusste Ausstrahlung. Der Humor entsteht aus ihrer Gelassenheit.

Einen Eindruck unserer bisherigen Arbeiten findet Ihr unter:
https://www.visuzfilms.com/

Das Projekt wird ohne Budget umgesetzt. Eine Vergütung sowie die Übernahme von Fahrt- oder Unterkunftskosten sind daher leider nicht möglich.

Wir bieten jedoch ein engagiertes Team, kreative Zusammenarbeit und hochwertiges Material für das eigene Showreel.

Für Verpflegung am Set ist selbstverständlich gesorgt – inklusive Pizza 🍕

 

**📩 Bewerbung & Kontakt**

Bitte sendet eure Bewerbung mit:
* aktuellem Foto
* Showreel (falls vorhanden)
* Instagram / facebook (falls vorhanden)

an:
**E-Mail: visuzfilms@gmail.com**
Betreff: *Casting „Das Pizza-Finale“ – Rollenname*

Wir freuen uns auf eure Bewerbungen!

Mein Schwerpunkt liegt auf kommerziellen Projekten, bei denen ich stets eine klare...

items.text:
CASTING CALL FOR VIRTUAL REALITY SHORT FILM!
THE SOUND OF ONE EYE CLOSING

PAID OPPORTUNITY - OPEN TO NON-UNION AND UNION ACTORS

SHOOT DATES: Late April 2026. 

Cory: Lead. Mid to late twenties, white, lesbian, she/her. Forced to deal with her strong need for internal control following a heartbreak. Emotionally intense and depressive. 3 days of shooting.

Indigo: Supporting. Mid to late twenties, white or racially ambiguous, lesbian, she/her. Whimsical in a Pacific Northwest, vibram-toe-shoe and herbal tea style. Charismatic leader with strong boundaries and a hint of a need for approval from others. 3 days of shooting. 

To apply, please send your Headshot, Resume and Demo Reel to: thesoundofoneeyeclosing@gmail.com

Thank you!

**Casting Call for a Queer Romcom Web Series**

UBCP ULB Web Series open to both union and non-union performers!

**Sign up here: ****https://forms.gle/izmkmehP8eKp3jdF8**

**Director Bio: **The show is created and directed by Panta Mosleh, a Canadian-Kurdish-Iranian writer and director with over a decade of experience in film and television. Her work spans award-winning shorts to network projects, and she’s known for character-driven comedy with emotional depth.

We’re looking for people of all backgrounds and ages to help bring this project to life! Whether you have on-set experience or are brand new and curious, we’d love to hear from you.

Let's welcome our new members!

If you're an actor, hope you get the role(s) you're seeking.

If you're casting for a role, please follow our (common-sense) guidelines.

items.text:
SERIAL DOKUMENTALNY TRUE CRIME

WARSZAWA i okolice

28.02 / 1.03

140-170zł 

Do nowego serialu dokumentalnego w formule true crime poszukuję statystów wg poniższej rozpiski.

28.02/1.03 - kontynuacja, 170zł/dzień
* KLAUDEK - mężczyzna, max 175cm wzrostu, SZATYN/ciemne blond włosy, noszący okulary (mile widziane, nie konieczne)

28.02 - stawka 140zł
* PACIOR - mężczyzna, wysoki, łysy, wiek 30+

Zgłoszenia wysyłajcie na adres: patrycja@podtytulem.pl

W tytule: nazwa postaci

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość oraz ZDJĘCIE TWARZY I SYLWETKI tylko z dnia zgłoszenia + ZDJĘCIE DŁONI (dłonie zadbane, paznokcie naturalne!).

Zgłoszenia bez zdjęcia dłoni nie będą brane pod uwagę.

items.text:
Casting call - filming 21st march
Deadline - 10 march

Please send age, profile(face, hands etc) , height

And a video answering the question: sweet or savoury and why

SUBJECT: casting call + NAME to serena@radiosez.co.uk

Must be comfortable in front of camera, holding a role for 40 mins - one take

Age range: 22-32

Unpaid No script/learning lines required.

London

Casting: 

Older boss white male

Female team lead mixed/asian

Black male office worker

Female office worker, middle class

White female receptionist

White ‘nerd’ male office worker

White nepo baby male, sporty/rugby physique 

For a new non profit youtube series. Looking at politics/music/social commentary. This is the pilot.

topComments.text: If there’s no script how are actors supposed to learn their lines?

items.text:
LONDON. MONSTER AUDITION CALL 2026

We’re hunting for our next masked creatures to join @monsters_kinc_ — one of the most recognised forces across the fashion + fetish scene.

If you’re 5’9+ with classical pointe training, fierce body language, immersive acting skills and the hunger to dominate a room — we want to see you.

Comfortable in masked performance.
Fearless in fetish settings.
Fire & aerial? Major bonus.

Private invite-only workshop audition.
Fees above equity rates.
London-based only.

Unleash your alter ego.
Embody the monster within.

Become a Monster.

Send CV, performance reel + height to
INFO@MONSTERSKINC.COM

🖤 Saturday 28th March 2026
📍London venue

items.text:
## **🎬 CASTING CALL – PAID ROLES (£550 Each)**

📍 **London (On-Set Shoot)**

📅 **Shoot Date: 17th March**

We’re casting for three paid roles for **HelloFresh** and **Green Chef**.

All roles are **£550**.

Talent must be available to shoot **in London on 17th March**.

Please read the full brief carefully before applying.

**🥗 HelloFresh – Single Mum**

**Female | 30–35**

**Fee: £550**

Looking for:
* Warm, relatable, modern energy
* Bright, likeable personality
* Natural on camera
* **Must be a parent**

This role requires genuine “real-life” family moments and comfort featuring your child(ren) in natural home footage.

**🥘 HelloFresh – Dad**

**Male | Mid-30s**

**Fee: £550**

Looking for:
* Calm, dependable, trustworthy presence
* Understated confidence
* Natural delivery
* **Must be a parent**

This role includes natural home/lifestyle footage with children.

**💪 Green Chef – Gym Guy / PT**

**Male | Mid-30s**

**Fee: £550**

Looking for:
* Credible personal trainer presence
* Grounded, knowledgeable delivery
* Strong on-camera authority
* **Must have active gym access**

Real gym environment required for pre-shoot footage.

## **🎥 B-ROLL REQUIREMENTS (IMPORTANT – ALL TALENT)**

All selected talent must supply lifestyle B-roll to support the edit.

**Pre-Shoot B-Roll (Required):**
* Filmed before shoot day
* Sent in advance
* Maximum 2 hours filming
* Shot list will be provided
* Natural, real-life footage only
* 
**👶 HelloFresh Talent – Children in B-Roll**

* Must be comfortable featuring children in pre-shoot B-roll
* Natural home/lifestyle moments only
* Minor release documentation will be provided if required
## **📌 How to Apply**

Please apply via this form only:

👉 https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScdiH6_ZP7I1xq0OHy6-_jFzGDt2w7oIRwRptlujEUXjLH6Uw/viewform?usp=header

Applications via DM or comments will not be considered.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – VOICE OVER ARTIST (MALE, US ACCENT)
We are seeking a male voice artist with an authentic American accent for a powerful and sensitive documentary exploring domestic violence, produced in collaboration with The Purple Project.

The role involves reading a series of poems written by survivors. The performance requires emotional intelligence, and the ability to deliver deeply personal material with authenticity and respect.

Details:

Male voice, natural US accent

Recording in London

Less than half a day’s work

Unpaid (charity collaboration)

This is an opportunity to contribute to an important project amplifying survivor voices and supporting meaningful change.

If interested, please get in touch.

topComments.text: Please let me know how to proceed forward or contact

‼️FINAL YEAR FILM AT THE UNIVERSITY OF SALFORD CASTING CALL‼️

The group creating their final film based on the Shakespeare play are CASTING!

Please see below for details of their production:

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of ‎text that says '‎Based on the beloved play by ملی Much WILLIAM SHAKESPEARE Ado CASTING CALL HERO Though soft-spoken, she is far from passive, she drives the central scheme of the story with warmth and playful intelligence. Her love for Claudio is sincere, and her loyalty to Beatrice is unwavering. Playing Age: 20-25 yrs Gender: Female Skills: Shakespeare Training (intermediate) Location: Capesthorne Hall Shoot Date: 16th 19th March 2026 Role is UNPAID. Transport expenses covered and catering is provided. For more information please contact: s.superfine@edu.salford.ac.uk Please include a headshot, availability, and a showreel/CV.‎'‎

I would say however that the lighting or lack of in your photos is doing you no favours. You could do with better front lighting to highlight your features and also better contrast. Hope that helps.
As Craig said Anything and Everything! Add a smiley pic for the family shoots too 🎬🎥

items.text:
# Testkunden gesucht - Kostenlose Website 

Hallo, ich möchte mich kurz Vorstellen. Mein Name ist Emanuel und ich bin seit einigen Jahren in der Software Entwicklung aktiv.

Vor kurzen habe ich mich dann selbstständig gemacht und biete aktuell eine Website Erstellung komplett kostenlos an, um Referenzen zu finden. 

Dafür kümmere ich mich zudem jedoch auch um SEO Optimierung Domain etc.

Solltest du also schonmal darüber nachgedacht haben deine Online Präsenz zu verbessern, biete ich dir die perfekte Möglichkeit dies kostenlos zu tun.

Weitere Software

Zudem biete ich auch andere Software Lösungen an. Da ich auch hier nach Referenzen suche, sind diese sehr kostengünstig. Beispielsweise Organisationstools, Tools zu Online Reservierungen, oder Online Vereinbarung von Terminen u.ä.

Klingt das für dich spannend? Schick gerne eine PN

Vor kurzen habe ich mich dann selbstständig gemacht und biete aktuell eine Website Erstellung komplett kostenlos an, um Referenzen zu finden. 

Dafür kümmere ich mich zudem jedoch auch um SEO Optimierung Domain etc.

Solltest du also schonmal darüber nachgedacht haben deine Online Präsenz zu verbessern, biete ich dir die perfekte Möglichkeit dies kostenlos zu tun.

Weitere Software

Zudem biete ich auch andere Software Lösungen an. Da ich auch hier nach Referenzen suche, sind diese sehr kostengünstig. Beispielsweise Organisationstools, Tools zu Online Reservierungen, oder Online Vereinbarung von Terminen u.ä.

Klingt das für dich spannend? Schick gerne eine PN

items.text:
Stellify Media are casting  for a new television Game show series for a major UK broadcaster, and we’re currently looking for exceptionally bright, curious and highly able young people aged 13–15. 

We’re especially keen to hear from families of children who: 

 
 • Love complex challenges 
 • Are academically advanced or gifted 
 • Enjoy deep thinking and problem-solving 
 • Show strong reasoning ability and intellectual curiosity 

The series is warm, fun and supportive  and designed for genuinely high-ability young minds who enjoy being stretched. 

Filming will take place in Suffolk (April 2026), with travel/accommodation covered where needed. 

If this sounds like your child, feel free to message me or email [castingHMTE@stellifytv.com](mailto:castingHMTE@stellifytv.com) and I can share more details. 

Thank you! 

Any personal information that you provide will be used and processed in accordance with our privacy notice which is available at:  [https://www.stellifymedia.com/contributor-privacy-notice](https://www.stellifymedia.com/contributor-privacy-notice)

SUNDAY CLOSING DATE: 15TH MARCH, 2026.'

We are looking for **EXTREMELY TALL athletic men** to double professional athletes.

**Body Double #1**
Height: **6'4"–6'6"**
225–250 lbs
NFL-style build

Male, white, 20s-30s

items.text:
Hello All!

I am a student at the University of Portsmouth, and I am currently shooting a short film to shine a light on the abusive difficulties that ballet dancers face, including domestic abuse. 

The synopsis is as follows:

In the winter of '08, a daughter returns to her childhood home, yet again trapped by her mother's aspirations, but this time, she has had enough. 

Jane is a young adult, about to finish one of the most prestigious dance schools in the UK. Returning home for the summer, she confronts her mother in a heartbreakingly raw encounter, where both bitter truths and suffocating affection finally meet. 

This 5-minute short film will explore nostalgia, identity, sacrifice, acceptance, and family love.

**FILMING LATE MARCH**

Here are two casting calls for the two characters involved:

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'UNIVERSITY UNVERSITY.OFPORTSMOUTH OF PORTSMOUTH FILMPRODUCTION ACTRESS CASTING CALL JANE (18-24) JANE ISA YOUNG ADULT, ABOUT TO FINISH ONE OF THE MOST PRESTIGIOUS DANCE SCHOOLSI IN THE UK- RETURNING HOME FOR THE WINTER, SHE CONFRONTS HER MOTHER IN A HEARTBREAKINGLY RAW ENCOUNTER WHERE BOTH BITTER TRUTHSAND SUFFOCATING AFFECTION FINALLY MEE. WE ARE LOOKING FOR SOMEONE WITH EMOTIONAL RANGE; THERE ARE SCENES OF ARGUING AND MOMENTS OF QUIET INSECURITY. PLEASE CONTACT TPTOESHORTFILMUOP@GMAL.COM FOR ANY ENQUIRIES AND APPLICATIONS. PLEASE ALSO ATACH RELEVANT MEDIA (HEADSHOTSETC @TIPTOE_ _SHORTFILM- INSTAGRAM'
May be an image of text

items.text:
**SHORT FILM CASTING CALL - “TAKEAWAYS”**

**OPEN TO UNION & NON-UNION - VOLUNTEER/UNPAID**

**DIRECTOR:** Jamie Lam

**CATEGORY:** Independent Short Film - UBCP ULB. Funded by BC Arts Council. 

**CASTING DIRECTOR:** Cathy Huynh

**COMPENSATION:** Volunteer/Unpaid. Food provided on set. Copy of film. IMDB credit.

**FILMING DATES/LOCATION:** March 21-22, 2026 (TBC) / Vancouver, BC

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **takeawaysfilm@gmail.com** with the subject heading** [Your Name - Role Name]** and include your headshot/photo, resume and demo reel (if applicable)

**LOGLINE:** A reluctant young boy working at his family’s restaurant learns to step up as his father quietly falls apart after a loss.

**ANDY — Male, 10-15, Chinese or East Asian-identifying.** Smart but apathetic, Andy is tired of helping out at the family restaurant, much rather preferring to play PC games at home. Even so, he takes after his dad Sam, embodying kindness and warmth when times get tough - **LEAD. CANTONESE PROFICIENCY IS A PLUS.**

**FEMALE CUSTOMER — Female, 35-45, Chinese or East Asian-identifying.** This female customers a regular at Sam’s restaurant. While paying for her food, she praises Andy for being such a well-brought up kid. **CANTONESE PROFICIENCY IS A PLUS. **

**TV DRAMA ACTOR - Male, 25-35, Chinese or East-Asian identifying. **This television actor is seen in a romantic Chinese drama.** MUST BE FLUENT IN CANTONESE. MUST BE COMFORTABLE WITH A KISSING SCENE. **FYI THIS ROLE SHOOTS BEFORE MARCH 20TH!**

**TV DRAMA ACTRESS - Female, 25-35, Chinese or East-Asian identifying. **This television actress is seen in a romantic Chinese drama.** MUST BE FLUENT IN CANTONESE. MUST BE COMFORTABLE WITH A KISSING SCENE. **FYI THIS ROLE SHOOTS BEFORE MARCH 20TH!**

# **Keynote Stanislavski**

A short, intensive, acting course.

 

3 x three hour practical workshops;

**Sat 4, Sun 19 & Sun 26 April ’26.**

Dartford, Kent.

**11 am to 2 pm each day.**

 

No charge for the workshops themselves, just a nominal £9.00 per session to help cover the venue hire.

 

This isn’t a money making enterprise; I’m simply wanting to meet some talented and reliable actors who are interested in exploring, in practice, the ideas of Stanislavski  (I run a small, actor-led theatre company focussing on intimate, ensemble performance.)

 
# **Interested?**

Just drop me an email:  [pddoust@hotmail.com](mailto:pddoust@hotmail.com)

(Please don’t DM me here - I won’t reply.)

 

Thanks, Paul.

items.text:
Branding for Artists: From Talent to Recognition
📅 March 15th
🕓 4:00 PM
📍 Południk Zero – Wilcza 25
Being good at what you do is no longer enough.
If you’re an artist, performer, comedian, or creative, you are already a brand, the question is whether you’re shaping it intentionally… or letting algorithms and awkward bios do it for you.
This interactive session is about clarity, presence, and visibility, without selling out, faking confidence, or turning into a LinkedIn motivational post.
We’ll explore:
How to communicate who you are in one sentence (without panicking)
The difference between talent, persona, and presence
Why some artists get booked, shared, and remembered and others don’t
Practical tools to align your stage identity with your online identity
No lectures. No corporate nonsense.
Just real talk, smart exercises, and honest feedback in a supportive, creative space.
Come if you want to be: 

✔ clearer
✔ more confident
✔ more recognizable
✔ more intentional as an artist
Leave with language, direction, and a stronger sense of “yeah, this is me.”

🎟️ tickets: https://fienta.com/pl/branding-as-an-artist

Bianca is also doing her hit Ghosted comedy show at 6 pm:

https://fienta.com/pl/ghosted-with-bianca-lala

items.text:
AKTOR (40-60l.) POSZUKIWANY
Witam!! Do etiudy operatorskiej Łódzkiej Szkoły Filmowej poszukujemy aktora do roli ojca.

Film utrzymany w stylistyce cyberpunkowej. Opowiada historię ojca, który samotnie wychowuje swojego syna, w międzyczasie prowadząc poszukiwania jego matki.

● Zarost mile widziany

● Szukamy oryginalnych twarzy

● W miarę wysportowana sylwetka również na plus (jednak nie typ kulturysty! zdrowa sylwetka)

🕰 Termin: 18-20.03.2026

🌐 Miejsce: Łódź i okolice

🏛 Zapewniamy zwrot za dojazd oraz zakwaterowanie na czas planu, jednak jest to ogłoszenie non-profit!

Proszę o podesłanie aktualnych zdjęć, demo aktorskiego oraz informacji o aktualnym miejscu zamieszkania.

martyna.produkcja@o2.pl

items.text:
⭐️EVC Talent Casting Show 2026⭐️

Die EVC Talent Casting Show 2026 geht in ihre 5. Ausgabe und wir suchen außergewöhnliche Talente, die bereit sind, die Bühne zu erobern!

Ob große Showmomente, bewegende Stimmen oder spektakuläre Performances wir geben Künstlerinnen und Künstlern eine Plattform, ihr Talent vor Jury und Publikum zu präsentieren.

🎭 Wer kann sich bewerben?

Wir öffnen unsere Bühne für:

• Musikerinnen & Musiker (Solo)

• Bands & Musikprojekte

• Tänzer & Tänzerinnen (Solo, Duo oder Crew)

• Artistinnen & Artisten (Akrobatik, Show, Performance)

• Comedians & Entertainer

• Tierische Talente mit besonderen Kunststücken

✨ Dabei gilt unser Motto 2026:

„Dein Talent kennt keine Grenzen“

Bei uns zählt nicht Herkunft, Stilrichtung oder Genre sondern Leidenschaft, Mut und Ausdruck.

Jede Bewerbung wird fair gesichtet. Jeder Act bekommt die gleiche Chance.

🎬 Die Jury-Castings starten im Frühjahr und Sommer 2026.

Dort entscheidet sich, wer es in die große Show schafft.

📌 Jetzt bewerben:

https://electricvisionscleve.de/forms/talent_casting.php

📩 Optional kannst du Fotos oder Vorschau-Videos senden an: electricvisions@gmx.de

Warte nicht auf den perfekten Moment mach ihn perfekt.

Wir freuen uns auf deine oder eure Bewerbung!

#EVCTalentCasting #TalentShow2026 #Jubiläumsstaffel #DeinTalentKenntKeineGrenzen

items.text: I am happy to announce an acting workshop with top TV creatives. We've chosen these people not only because they have worked on *How To Sell Drugs Online (Fast)*, *Star Trek*, *Science Cops *and *King of Stonks* but they are also GOOD PEOPLE. Held at the lovely  Film Acting School Cologne. Members of the new "Cologne Actors Club" get a discount, as do current students of FAS. Feel free to reach out for more info. Meldet euch gerne für weitere Infos.😃

Meldet euch gerne für weitere Infos.😃

Wiek nie ma znaczenia — ważne, aby była to osoba pełnoletnia (20+).

Opłata – 100 zł

Proszę zgłaszać się pod numerem: +48 790 805 669  

Najlepiej od razu przesłać zdjęcia.  

Miłego wieczoru!

items.text:
**HALLO PIŁA**

FILM FABULARNY LATA 70 - O Polskim bohaterze dla znanej platformy streamingowej Szukamy statystów

**24.03 i 25.03 **( obowiązkowe 2 dni )

Panowie 18 -55 lat ( Jako Technik Mechanik samolotowy)

**STAWKA 450 ZŁ **( 2 dni zdjęciowe + charakteryzacja )

**24.03.26**

Panowie 18 -35 lat ( Jako młody Pilot ) **EPIZOD NIEMY**

**STAWKA 350 zł** ( za dzień zdjęciowy + charakteryzacja )

**25.03.26**

Panowie 18 -35 lat ( Jako kandydat na Pilota - MAX DO 180 cm wzrostu )

**STAWKA 200 zł** ( za dzień zdjęciowy + charakteryzacja )

Panowie 18 -55 lat ( Jako Technik Mechanik samolotowy)

**STAWKA 200 zł** ( za dzień zdjęciowy + charakteryzacja )

**CHARAKTERYZACJA 23.03.2026**

Wytyczne charakteryzacji:

**MĘŻCZYŹNI:**

- WŁOSY- raczej dłuższe, nachodzące na uszy i kark. Nieakceptowane są włosy obcięte bardzo krótko maszynką ,wygolone boki i kark z dłuższą górą, wycięte wzorki na włosach oraz nienaturalne kolory oraz farbowane np. na czarny.

- ZAROST - mogą być wąsy ,baki, lub pełny zarost ale naturalny niestylizowany u barbera.

- panowie na mundurowych mogą mieć włosy krótsze, odsłonięte uszy i kark, ale niewygoleni maszynką. Ogoleni na gładko.

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres:** ****[jarek.drzycimski@podtytulem.pl](mailto:jarek.drzycimski@podtytulem.pl)**

W tytule: **PIŁA** 

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość + wymiary: wzrost, klatka, pas, biodra, rozmiar ubrania i buta

W załączniku: ZDJĘCIE TWARZY I SYLWETKI: tylko z dnia zgłoszenia + panowie zdjęcie twarzy z profilu

ZDJĘCIE TWARZY - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI – aktualne, cała sylwetka

***SERDECZNIE ZAPRASZAMY***

items.text:
**Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Szukamy matki francuskiej dziewczynki ( casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje kobiety **w wieku 30 – 35 lat** do roli matki francuskiej dziewczynki. Kobieta wystąpi w 2 scenach ataku Niemców na budynek cywilny. W jednej scenie postać matki dziewczynki ma dialog po francusku ze swoją córką. Mile widziana osoba **z Gliwic lub okolic, Zabrze czy Katowice.** Szukamy kogoś bez farbowanych włosów, bez malowanych paznokci czy braku tatuaży na twarzy. Zdjęcia próbne planujemy **15.03.26 między 10:30 a 15:00 ( Niedziela )**

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
Hello everyone,

I am currently casting for my next short film.

Short Film | 10–12 mins | Kitchen Sink Realism / Comedy-Drama

West Midlands | Please email jake.jakej@outlook.com if interested in any of the characters or just want to know more. 

Logline

On the final night of their beloved council estate pub, a tight-knit group of regulars refuse to let the council shut it quietly, turning a wake into a siege, and a farewell into one last, defiant karaoke anthem.

Synopsis

The Marlborough Arms is the heart of a West Midlands council estate. The place where weddings are toasted, funerals are mourned, and arguments are settled over cheap lager.

When two council bailiffs arrive early to lock up the pub for good, landlord Dave and his loyal regulars are forced to confront what the closure really means. As old resentments flare and the reality sets in that the building has already been sold to developers, the group fractures — then rallies.

Ensemble cast

Characters

Dave

Male | 45–55 | West Midlands/ North English accent

Malc

Male | 58–70 | West Midlands / Black Country accent

Sharon

Female | 40–50 | Strong Midlands accent

Kel

Female | 28–38 | Midlands accent

Tyler

Male | 20–26 | Midlands accent

Council Bailiff 1

Male | 35–55 | Neutral accent

Council Bailiff 2

Any gender | 25–50 | Neutral accent

Production Location: Stoke-On-Trent       Shoot dates 23rd 24th and 25th of March.

Voluntary only however expenses, including travel and food will be covered. Also, you will receive an IMDB credit upon the film's completion.

items.text:
CASTING CALL — MP Casting Authority
MP Casting Authority is seeking plus-size / super plus-size female on-camera talent (21+) for an upcoming hip-hop music video shooting in the Rhode Island / Southeastern Massachusetts area.

This role is specifically for very full-figured, super plus-size women with strong presence and comfort performing in a high-energy music video environment. Confidence and camera presence are the priority. Modeling, influencer, or performance experience is welcome but not required.

Shoot details: One-day shoot — 3 hours on set

Rate: $100/hour (flat rate)

Provided: Food on set

Includes: Copy + on-screen credit for your work

To submit, email mpcastingauthority@gmail.com

Subject line: “MUSIC VIDEO CASTING – [Your Name]”

Please include:

 • 2–3 recent photos (no heavy filters; full-body preferred)

 • Instagram or portfolio link (if applicable)

 • Name, age, and location

 • General availability

Selected applicants will be contacted directly. Serious submissions only.

items.text:
LAS VEGAS WRITERS WANTED – Sketch Comedy Collective (Paid Per Idea)

Hello Vegas creatives 

We’re building and running a low-budget sketch comedy group here in Las Vegas, and I’m currently looking for writers who want to help shape the creative direction from the ground up.

The Mission:

To entertain and educate.

We’ll be filming short skits and sketches (primarily on iPhones) that blend humor with substance.

We’re looking for writers who can pitch original sketch ideas in one of three categories:

 1. Generally Comedic – Pure humor, absurdity, satire, character-driven bits, etc.

 2. Politically Charged – Comedic sketches with ironic undertones (smart satire, not lazy outrage).

 3. Social Issue-Based – Commentary on real-world topics, delivered through humor and irony.

The tone we’re aiming for: clever, self-aware, bold, ironic, not preachy.

💰 Compensation

This is a paid independent contractor position.

This is not hourly.

Writers will be paid per green-lit concept.

Pay structure (open to compromise):

 • $75 per approved sketch concept

A “green-lit concept” should include:

 • Clear premise

 • Character breakdown

 • Beginning / escalation / punchline structure

 • Intended tone (comedic, political satire, social irony)

 • 1–2 pages max

Not just:

“What if a politician was secretly a DoorDash driver?”

(That’s not worth $75.)

 • Potential bonuses if the sketch performs well online

 • Opportunity for ongoing collaboration if there’s creative consistency and chemistry

We can scale pay upward as the group monetizes and grows. 

⚠️ Important

Concepts must be original and primarily human-developed.

AI may be used lightly for dialogue polishing or minor assistance, but not for generating the core concept or premise.

🎥 Production Style

 • Shot on iPhones

 • Fast turnaround

 • Character-driven

 • Low budget but high creativity

 • Consistent releases

If you’re a writer who:

 • Has sharp comedic instincts

 • Isn’t afraid to tackle real issues through irony

 • Understands pacing and short-form content

 • Wants to build something long-term

Drop a comment or DM Kenyon Wellington

topComments.text: Definitely interested in writing comedy sketches!

items.text:
Servus zusammen 🙂

ich möchte euch einen kleinen Einblick in ein freies Filmprojekt geben, das überwiegend mit **engagierten Komparsen und Laiendarstellern** entstanden ist.

Viele, die sonst im Hintergrund stehen, haben hier größere Rollen übernommen — und genau das macht für mich den Reiz solcher Projekte aus. Mit wenig Budget, viel Improvisation und echter Spielfreude ist ein Film entstanden, der vor allem vom Teamgeist lebt.

Ein großes Dankeschön an alle Mitwirkenden — ohne euch gäbe es solche Projekte nicht.

Wer mag, kann gerne mal reinschauen 🙂

Wir sind auf YouTube. „Familie Brandl Comedy“ hier der Link.
👉 https://youtu.be/ndAtSQOVREY?si=9vq-k4j9bFdRwume

items.text:
Hi, 

I’m part of the casting team for a new television series for a major UK broadcaster, and we’re currently looking for exceptionally bright, curious and highly able young people aged 13–15. 

We’re especially keen to hear from families of children who: 

 
 • Love complex challenges 
 • Are academically advanced or gifted 
 • Enjoy deep thinking and problem-solving 
 • Show strong reasoning ability and intellectual curiosity 

The series is warm, fun and supportive  and designed for genuinely high-ability young minds who enjoy being stretched. 

Filming will take place in Suffolk (April 2026), with travel/accommodation covered where needed. 

If this sounds like your child, feel free to message me or email [castingHMTE@stellifytv.com](mailto:castingHMTE@stellifytv.com) and I can share more details. 

Thank you! 

Any personal information that you provide will be used and processed in accordance with our privacy notice which is available at:  [https://www.stellifymedia.com/contributor-privacy-notice](https://www.stellifymedia.com/contributor-privacy-notice)  

Interested parents or guardians should email [castingHMTE@stellifytv.com](mailto:castingHMTE@stellifytv.com) to register interest.

IF so, WE WOULD LOVE to HEAR FROM YOUI THOSE SELECTED MUST HAVE AVAILABILITY TO ATTEND: FILMING IN SUFFOLK FOR THE WEEK OF 27TH APRIL 1ST MAY, 2026. to REGISTER INTEREST, PLEASE EMAIL: CASTINGHMTE CASTINGHMTE@STELLIFYTV.COM INC NCLUDING OUR NAME, THE CHILD' NAME AND DETAILS YOUR RELATIONSHI AND CONTACT TELEPHONE NUMBER. SUNDAY CLOSING DATE: 15TH MARCH, 2026.'

❗***CASTING CALL***❗

Meash Media are looking for a confident, charismatic female presenter to become the face of our upcoming digital campaign and promotional content for a large North East-based client that has been featured on ITV.

This is a paid opportunity.

Filming to take place in Washington, Tyne and Wear, and Stockton-on-Tees, County Durham.

**Deadline: **31st March 2026

Please complete the linked form below and attach a short video (details provided within the form)

**[https://bit.ly/CastingCallSpring26](https://bit.ly/CastingCallSpring26)**

**Location: **North East/Tyne and Wear 

**Age range:** 18-40

**Requirements: **
* Female** **with a natural, clean-cut, and professional look for a corporate commercial.
* Friendly, confident and well-spoken, with excellent camera presence. 
* Previous acting or presenting experience is preferred, but we welcome talented screen performance students. 
* Must be available for ongoing filming until completion of the campaign.

Please email [contactus@meashmedia.com](mailto:contactus@meashmedia.com) with any enquiries.

Last Minute Casting Call!

A Capilano University student film production is in need of two young female actors who are willing to smoke herbal cigarettes.

Callbacks would take place on March 2nd in North Vancouver, and a self-tape would be required before callbacks.

Shooting dates are March 13th, 14th and 15th.

 

Please email christinahodges@my.capilanou.ca for sides and if more details are required.

items.text:
# CASTING CALL FOR A SFU student film

non-union. unpaid.

**Project Synopsis**

The film is eerie and has supernatural elements. ALEX experiences visions of an eerie field with a nearing FIGURE while going about their day. We follow as this other world steep into theirs. 

~ ACTING EXPERIENCE IS NOT REQUIRED.

The two characters only share ~2 scenes together.

ALEX: (18-25yo) A little neurotic. An overthinker. The visions are affecting the quality of life as they keep losing time. Lives alone and works contract financial jobs from home. Very little dialogue. There is one scene where ALEX changes from work clothes to pajamas. Discussion will happen before set and everything will be adjusted to your comfort level!

FIGURE: (ageless) must be comfortable wearing some type of mask or face covering. A pivotal point in the story. We will never see a face clearly. Non-speaking but a sinister presence. 

SHOOT DAY: March 7th and 8th

7th: outside (with easy access to house), later night. Langley. If there is any concerns regarding transportation we can arrange help for you!

8th: Burnaby area, day.

Please email your headshot, availability to have meeting & demo reel (if you have one) to mgjohnson.film@gmail.com

items.text:
****FILLED**                                           **FILLED****

🎬 **CASTING CALL – 2 FEMALE BACKGROUND ACTORS**

We are looking for **2 female background actors** (open ethnicity), **age 25–40**, to play **nurses working at an old age home** in a short scene for our feature film project.

This is a background role that helps bring authenticity and realism to the setting.

**Wardrobe:**
If you have your own **scrubs or apron**, that would be great! If not, no worries — we will arrange something suitable.

**Location:** Surrey City Library 

**Date:** Saturday, **28 February 2026**

**Time:** 10:00 AM – 11:30 AM

**Compensation:** Volunteer position
(Crafty/snacks will be provided.)

If interested, please send a brief introduction and recent photo to:
📩 **expressentryfilm@gmail.com**

Feel free to share with anyone who might be a good fit!

items.text:
CASTING CALL – EXTRAS WANTED 🎬
Music Video Shoot | Saturday 7th March 2026 | Central London

We’re looking for confident, stylish, and high-energy individuals to appear as extras in the upcoming music video for Based Lychee’s brand new single, The Don of London.

This is set to be a bold, cinematic shoot capturing the power, presence, and unmistakable vibe of London city life.

🔥 THE VIBE

Think:

Sharp, powerful energy

Luxury-meets-street aesthetic

Confident, charismatic presence

Authentic London attitude

We’re creating iconic visuals that reflect dominance, ambition, and style.

👥 WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR

Ages 18–40

All ethnicities & genders welcome

Strong looks, standout style, or unique presence

Comfortable on camera

Able to bring personality and energy

Actors, models, creatives, dancers, and first-timers all encouraged to apply.

📍 SHOOT DETAILS

Date: Saturday 7th March 2026

Location: Central London (exact location shared upon confirmation)

Time: Full-day availability required

Compensation: (unfortunately, as its a charity commissioned shoot. Will be unpaid. )

Refreshments provided

🎥 WHY GET INVOLVED?

Be part of a major music video production

Network with creatives in the industry

Gain on-screen exposure

Experience a professional set environment

📩 HOW TO APPLY

Send the following:

Recent photos (face & full length)

Name & age

Contact details

Any previous on-camera experience (if applicable)

Send applications to: basedlychee2026@gmail.com

Subject Line: “The Don of London – Extra Application”

Step into the scene. Bring the presence.

This is London energy at its finest. 👑🔥

IN NEED OF TWO ACTORS FOR LEAD ROLES IN FINAL YEAR STUDENT FILM 

We are now opening applications for three actors of our upcoming short film Redacted, written and directed by Jaye Cockerham.

Location Based in DERBY. 

If you are interested, please contact via email:

jayecockerham27@gmail.com - DIRECTOR 

jacobgagliardi@gmail.com - PRODUCER

LOGLINE: Desperate worker begins working for a unknown company that has a dark secret

We look forward to hearing from you!

May be an image of text

May be an image of drink and text that says 'INTRODUCTION CHARACTER AGE- GE-25-40 This character is a joyful man that appears as a warm, polished figure, dressed in a neat office suit, hair perfectly combed posture relaxed yet deliberate He wears a permanent, practiced smile that never quite reaches his eyes. His voice is calm, reassuring, and gently enthusiastic, like a corporate training narrator from an old instructional reel. This character will be in the beginning of movie revealing the job to the new hire the INFORMATION Food and Drink Supplied Transport Paid For Not a Paid job'

items.text:
STATYŚCI, JELENIA GÓRA
Dzień dobry,
Na warsztaty Szkoły Filmowej w Łodzi, pod opieką Jana Jakuba Kolskiego oraz Grzegorza Jaroszuka, poszukujemy statystów w różnym wieku do scen w kościele i taborze.

Scena w kościele (czwartek) – wygłodzeni mieszkańcy wioski, w przypływie desperacji, zjadają łapczywie chleb.
Scena w taborze (piątek) – pokazanie taboru romskiego, wypełnienie drugiego planu.

Zdjęcia odbywają się w czwartek i piątek, 05–06.03, w godzinach 10:00–17:00. Zapewniamy transport na  lokacje z Jeleniej Góry oraz ciepły posiłek. 

Z uwagi na niekomercyjny charakter nagrań udział w nich jest nieodpłatny, jednak daje możliwość zdobycia cennego doświadczenia i pracy w twórczym środowisku:) 

Zainteresowanych proszę o kontakt mailowy: w.blawat@student.filmschool.lodz.pl lub w wiadomości prywatnej

‼️📢 POSZUKIWANI STATYŚCI
ETIUDA STUDENCKA WSF

SCENA IMPREZY W KLUBIE 🎬🎉

Do realizacji etiudy studenckiej poszukuje 50 statystów do sceny imprezy w klubie.

📍 Miejsce: Warszawa

📅 Data: 02.03

⏰ Godziny: 19:00–22:00

Jeśli masz ochotę poczuć klimat planu filmowego, i wziąć udział w ciekawej produkcji – zgłoś się.

Zgłoszenia proszę zostawiać w komentarzu pod postem lub wysyłać na mail:

📩 jullietta3001@gmail.com

Proszę o krótką informację o sobie (imię, nazwisko, wiek), aktualne zdjęcie, numer telefonu.

Osoby statystujące mogą zaprosić do udziału znajomych. Będzie nam bardzo miło – prosimy jedynie o załączenie w wiadomości e-mail danych zgłaszanych osób.

Do zobaczenia na planie!

items.text:
Narodowy Teatr Edukacji im. Adama Mickiewicza we Wrocławiu zaprasza na rozmowy sezonowe chętnych do udziału w spektaklach naszego Teatru, realizowanych w sezonie 2026/27. 

Poszukujemy zarówno uzdolnionych amatorów, jak i aktorów z wykształceniem kierunkowym (AST, Studium Teatralne, Szkoły Artystyczne ROE, Szkoła Aktorska LART itp.)

Przedstawienia będą grane na terenie całego kraju - od września bieżącego roku, do czerwca 2027.

WYMAGANIA:

- wiek:  18 – 40 lat

- dyspozycyjność

- dobry stan zdrowia

- mile widziane dodatkowe umiejętności - wokalne i taneczne

OFERUJEMY:

- zatrudnienie na sezon w formie umowy-zlecenia/umowy o dzieło w ustalonym wymiarze (2,3 lub 4 tygodnie w miesiącu)

- gwarancję pracy (działamy nieprzerwanie od ponad 25 lat)

- elastyczny czas pracy

- atrakcyjne zarobki

- opcję ubezpieczenia zdrowotnego

- możliwość osobistego rozwoju artystycznego w profesjonalnym zespole teatralnym

- ambitny repertuar teatralny (głównie klasyka polska i europejska)

- okres prób do spektakli (sierpień-połowa września, WROCŁAW) dodatkowo gratyfikowany

Powyższa oferta dotyczy oddziału siedziby głównej Teatru we Wrocławiu.

Zgłoszenia i CV prosimy wysyłać do Dyrektora Artystycznego Marzenny Kucmer-Kołeńskiej na adres:

 teatr.zgloszenia@gmail.com

items.text:
Hejka, 

Zaczynamy nowy casting do reklamy portalu zakupowego. 

Główną rolę w reklamie będzie stanowiła osoba znana. My szukamy reszty obsady partnerującej. 

Szukamy wśród urody white caucasian. 

**SZUKAMY:**
1- Klientka zakładu fryzjerskiego 55 l.  - matka - **rola mówiona. Dobrze aby miała lekki talent komediowy. Musi być gotowa na ścięcie włosów. Nie wiemy jeszcze na jaką fryzurę ale w ankiecie jest o to pytanie i można opisać.**
2- klientka zakładu 25 - córka **rola mówiona.**
3-4 Para genZ plus pies - 18-25 l. **rRola mówiona  - musza czuć się komfortowo w pracy na planie z psem.**
 5.  Fryzjer 30-40l - mężczyzna - mile widziany prawdziwy fryzjer ale zupełnie nie jest to konieczność - rola mówiona
6 - klient/lklientka - osoba chętna ściąg włosy - wiek 18-55 lat - rola mówiona
7.  Chłopak - wiek 35-45 lat - rola mówiona 

8.Dziewczyna wiek 35-45 lat - rola mówiona 

9. panna młoda 25 l. **rola mówiona**
2 - świadkowa 25 l. **rola mówiona**
3-6(ok) druhny 20-30 l. - 
7 - świadek - 30 l. - 

TIMING: 

04.03 - termin wysyłania materiałów do godziny 17.00

7,8,9.03 - recall 

14-15.03 przymiarki 

18.03 - sesja foto 

19,20,21,22.03 - daty planu zdjęciowego 

Stawka 

1500 zł dzień zdjęciowy 

Prawa 5000 zł 

Prawa wyślę zainteresowanym na maila

Do środy 04.03 czekam na zgłoszenia pod mailem [slavic.squad.cast@gmail.com](mailto:slavic.squad.cast@gmail.com) 

Proszę o wpisanie 
1. Imię i nazwisko 
2. Wiek 
3. Numer telfonu 
4. Do jakiej roli się zgłaszasz 
5. 2-3 zdjęcia 

Zdjęcia w warszawie

Proszę o wpisanie 
1. Imię i nazwisko 
2. Wiek 
3. Numer telfonu 
4. Do jakiej roli się zgłaszasz 
5. 2-3 zdjęcia 

Zdjęcia w warszawie
items.title: Hejka,

items.text:
While reviewing auditions I constantly see that learning editing is needed BIGTIME! Let's get your tapes looking awesome!

This Saturday's VIRTUAL workshop focuses on helping actors **professionally edit their auditions and reels,** regardless of the device you use.

ALSO, I'm going to share some significant ways **actors can save money** on Actors Access and Casting Networks so you can invest that money in yourself (and your everyday lives).

As always this workshop is only **$37 or free **with your Climbing The Call Sheet membership ($27/month). Registration is easy at www.ClimbingTheCallSheet.com

Have an awesome week and let me know if you have any questions.

💫 Let yourself feel something unforgettable.
💛 You deserve it all.

items.text:
ACTORS NEEDED

Montclair State University (NJ). 

Tony Pemberton’s Film 111 Directing Workshop 

Thursdays, March 5, 19, 26, 2026

2 sessions: 
1:00pm - 4:20pm
5:30pm - 8:45pm

VOLUNTEER your time to help budding directors learn communication skills with actors, and gain experience of what it’s like being on set. Raw footage of what you film will be provided, plus relationships with 15-20 new directors will be established.

DM me with your 
PHONE 
EMAIL
WEBSITE/ACTORS ACCESS/BACKSTAGE link and/or INSTAGRAM

And let me know if: 

you can do either or both sessions: 1:00pm - 4:20pm
5:30pm - 8:45pm

on which of these dates: Thursdays, March 5, 19, 26

Free parking passes will be provided. Or the NJ Transit bus and train go right to campus from Manhattan or from other parts of NJ.

items.text:
*PAID OPPORTUNITY: CALLING DIRECTORS & DIRECTORS OF PHOTOGRAPHY (DOPs) for "Fires in the Heather" Proof of Concept*

We are seeking a visionary Director and a skilled  Director of Photography (DOP) for a paid opportunity to bring a pivotal scene or two from our new screenplay, “Fires in the Heather," to life.

**About the Project:**
"Fires in the Heather" is an evocative drama fantasy inspired by a compelling real story. Our goal is to produce a high-quality proof-of-concept piece (1-2 scenes) to showcase our artistic vision and secure investment for the full feature film. This is a unique opportunity to shape the foundational visual and narrative style of a truly impactful story.

Project Details:

Title: 
Fires in the Heather

Genre: 
Drama Fantasy (inspired by a real story)

Objective: 
Create 1-2 scenes for a proof-of-concept for potential investment.

Compensation: 
This is a paid position. Budget details are pending and will be discussed with shortlisted candidates.

Location:
Sussex area, UK. Candidates based in or able to work in this region are preferred.

Further Information:
You can learn more about the project at https://ohwafilm.com/one-pager/fires-in-the-heather/

Who We Are Looking For:

1. Director:
We seek an experienced Director with a strong visual style, a profound understanding of narrative storytelling, and a passion for drama fantasy. You should be adept at guiding performances and translating a screenplay into compelling cinematic sequences. Experience with proof-of-concept or short film production is beneficial.

2. Director of Photography (DOP):**
We are searching for a talented DOP with a keen eye for composition, lighting, and cinematic atmosphere. Your portfolio should demonstrate your ability to craft visually stunning images that enhance dramatic and fantastical elements. Experience working collaboratively with a director to achieve a cohesive vision is essential.

To Apply:
Interested Directors and DOPs are invited to submit their professional portfolios, showreels, and a brief statement outlining their interest in "Fires in the Heather."

Please send all submissions to our Producer:
Susan Rutledge
Email: susan@ohwafilm.com

Confidentiality:
A Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) will be digitally sent out to candidates whose portfolios align with our vision to facilitate the sharing of the full script and other relevant documentation.

Further Casting:
Please stay tuned for future casting announcements for actors and other crew roles.

We look forward to reviewing your work and potentially collaborating on "Fires in the Heather." Thank you for your interest.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of fire and text that says 'AFILM FILMBYOHWA BY OHWA FIRES FIR R S IN THE HEATHER'

items.text:
**CASTING CALL- CHICHESTER BASED SHOOT **

Hello All!

I am a student at the University of Portsmouth, and I'm currently shooting a short film to shine a light on the abusive difficulties that ballet dancers face, including domestic abuse.** AND WE STILL NEED OUR CAROL!!** 

**Filming** **MID APRIL- please message for more information!!**

The synopsis is as follows:

In the winter of '08, a daughter returns to her childhood home, yet again trapped by her mother's aspirations, but this time, she has had enough.

Jane, a young adult, is about to finish one of the most prestigious dance schools in the UK. Returning home for the summer, she confronts her mother in a heartbreakingly raw encounter, where both bitter truths and suffocating affection finally meet.

This 5-minute short film will explore nostalgia, identity, sacrifice, acceptance, and family love.

**URGENT CASTING CALL!!**

**Paid roles**

My company [Serious Glass Productions](https://www.facebook.com/groups/492259404158323/user/61565641432238/?__cft__[0]=AZZoVytAen2a4WenwWfveNQEWe-HcP32iDYPlgT4XqWTAgOSbwue9jVZHuN05LfG3MeH-ITOuZ-TFLXOXtJ9JPmifl9UBEFHjih71uDWC5BG-e2AwGQ8pcZqE3YsFRPqg7U19jFmtXHY5X3UIHLXfIfA&__tn__=-]K-R) are urgently looking for performers for a charity film shooting in the Portsmouth area.

Shoot dates: March 18th-20th 2026.
Each role will only be required for one day's filming.

We are seeking actors - ideally local to Portsmouth - but will consider performers from further afield and will pay travel expenses in addition to fee.

We have received applications already and are processing them, but are still keen to hear from actors fitting the following descriptions:

Role 1

Male, no beard, short hair, fit and healthy physique

Military serviceman-type

Age range: 40s-50s

Ethnicity: White/British

Role 2:

Female, mother character

Age range: 35-45

Ethnicity: Mixed heritage/ethnicity

Role 3:

Female child

Age range: 6-10 yrs

Ethnicity: Mixed heritage/ethnicity - NB: same ethnicity/heritage as mum character (and ideally the real-life daughter of our mum).

(NB: Production will comply fully with UK child performance regulations.)

Role 4:

Male, no beard, short hair, fit and healthy physique

Age range: 30s

Ethnicity: White/British

Military serviceman-type

If you fit any of these descriptions - or are the parent/guardian of a child who fits our requirement - please email 

simon@seriousglass.co 

**AS SOON AS POSSIBLE** with links to showreel/portfolio/experience.

Suitable candidates will be given further details and asked to provide a self-tape.

PLEASE NOTE: This is a charity film, **but these are paid positions, requiring approximately one day’s filming per role**.

Please pass this on to anyone you think may like to hear about it.

Thank you,

[Serious Glass Productions](https://www.facebook.com/groups/492259404158323/user/61565641432238/?__cft__[0]=AZZoVytAen2a4WenwWfveNQEWe-HcP32iDYPlgT4XqWTAgOSbwue9jVZHuN05LfG3MeH-ITOuZ-TFLXOXtJ9JPmifl9UBEFHjih71uDWC5BG-e2AwGQ8pcZqE3YsFRPqg7U19jFmtXHY5X3UIHLXfIfA&__tn__=-]K-R)

items.title: **URGENT CASTING CALL!!**

items.text:
Actors.Can I say something slightly uncomfortable?

The thing that makes you hard to live with…
 is the thing that makes you powerful on screen.

That deep loneliness?

 That ache to be seen?

 That hunger to matter?

That’s not weakness.

That’s your instrument.

Most actors try to “fix” it.
Or hide it.
 Or numb it.

The ones who book?
 They use it.

We’ll be teaching a free class Tuesday March 3rd  on how to find your own magic and bring it to the role.

If you’ve ever:
 – Felt “too much”
 – Felt embarrassed by how badly you want this
 – Wondered why you’re talented but not booking

You’ll want to be there.

LINK: https://us02web.zoom.us/j/88209960827?pwd=5lAKHO7q6BLZzEaCmGaGxORdja9CKq.1
Passcode: ACTING 

Tuesday March 3rd 
12:30 pm pacific 
🇬🇧 United Kingdom
London – 8:30 PM

BOOKED THE ROLE HAD MY CALLBACK FOR!!!! 11 24 Stephen Andrew October 2024 recommends Screen Acting School. Screen acting school has SERIOUSLY! helped me take my acting to the next evel, I'm now booking multiple gigs month!'

Myself and the team have a few years of HETV and film industry experience so we are looking to tap into all our contacts here, it's going to be a really special production.

We'd love self-tapes by 15th March if you would like to be part of our gorgeous team!

More info on the below website:

https://medicineshortfilm.squarespace.com/casting

items.text:
CASTING

Hi everyone 😊

We’re currently casting for a paid on site shoot in London on 9 March for First Portfolio, an investment gifting app.

We’re filming a series of short interview style social videos featuring different family roles, including:

• Aunt / Uncle (25–45)
• Parent (30–50)
• Grandparent (55–75)

The tone we’re looking for is very natural and conversational. It should feel like real family members sharing honest thoughts rather than delivering a scripted advert. We’re not looking for theatrical performances, just authentic and relatable energy.

Location is London and the shoot will run for approximately half a day. This is a paid opportunity, so please share your rate when you get in touch. Usage will be for social media and may include paid digital advertising, with full details confirmed in a contract.

If you’re interested, please send a message with your headshot, showreel if available, your age range, your rate and confirmation that you’re available on 9 March.

Thank you and looking forward to connecting 😊

topComments.text: Experienced freelance model actress available also my family are models too

items.text:
**❗*****CASTING CALL*****❗**

Meash Media are looking for a confident, charismatic female presenter to become the face of our upcoming digital campaign and promotional content for a large North East-based client that has been featured on ITV.

This is a paid opportunity.

Filming to take place in Washington, Tyne and Wear, and Stockton-on-Tees, County Durham.

**Deadline: **31st March 2026

Please complete the linked form below and attach a short video (details provided within the form)

https://bit.ly/CastingCallSpring26

**Location: **North East/Tyne and Wear 

**Age range:** 18-40

**Requirements: **
* Female with a natural, clean-cut, and professional look for a corporate commercial.
* Friendly, confident and well-spoken, with excellent camera presence. 
* Previous acting or presenting experience is preferred, but we welcome talented screen performance students. 
* Must be available for ongoing filming until completion of the campaign.

Please email contactus@meashmedia.com with any enquiries.

items.previewDescription: Historische Dokumentationen, Reenactment und Bildungsprojekte aus Weinheim/Mannheim/Heidelberg. Mit Schülern, Schauspielern & Zeitzeugen machen wir Geschichte lebendig – jetzt Filme ansehen & mitwirken Filmemacher aus Mannheim für historische Dokumentationen und Reenacting

sharedPost.text:
Für eine Hauptrolle in unserer historischen Dokumentation über Elisabeth Auguste (Kurfürstin, 18. Jahrhundert) suchen wir dringend einen männlichen Darsteller (ehrenamtlich).

Zur Rolle:
Gesucht wird ein Mann bis ca. 45–50 Jahre für die Rolle eines Offiziers (Kontext: Erster Koalitionskrieg) sowie Geliebter von Elisabeth Auguste. Es handelt sich um eine zentrale, wiederkehrende Figur.

Dreh & Zeitaufwand:

insgesamt ca. 7 Drehtage im Jahr 2026
erster Drehtermin: 07. März 2026 in Bensheim
weitere Drehs voraussichtlich in Mannheim, Weinheim und Heidelberg
Wichtig: Die Mitwirkung ist ehrenamtlich (unbezahlt).

Wenn du Interesse hast oder jemanden kennst, der passen könnte, freuen wir uns über eine kurze Nachricht (gern mit Foto/kurzer Vorstellung und ggf. Schauspielerfahrung).

items.text:
ISO: Background Performers – March 2 – VOLUNTEER

Hi everyone!

We’re looking for background performers for a short film shooting on March 2nd. You’ll be playing club attendees and bystanders in a nightclub scene.

This is a self-funded passion project, and these are volunteer roles. It’s a great opportunity to gain on-set experience, connect with other creatives, and be part of an indie production. Meals and crafty will be provided.

If you’re available and interested, please DM me with your availability and a recent photo. Feel free to share with anyone who might want to join!

Additional information: 

Director: Brandon James Gilbert

Producer(s): Javier Porragas, Jacob Crawford 

DOP: Max Brey 

This is a Union Project, but your BG work will not be applicable to Union status.

items.text:
Vicky Boone Casting is looking for Latino men ages 30-50 for a World Cup Academy Sports commercial!

We are looking for:

[SOCCER FAN] Male, 30-50, Latino. Real looks/Dad vibes. Mustache is a plus, but not required. OCP.

Project: Academy Sports + Outdoors
Agency: McGarrah Jessee
Production Company: The Bear
Project Type: Social Media Campaign
Union Status: Non-Union
Project Rate: $500/day
Fitting Rate: $50/hour (if applicable)
Fitting Date(s): March 23 or March 24 (TBD)
Shoot Date(s): March 26 - March 30, 2026 (will likely shoot 1-2 day within this range)
Shoot Location: Austin, TX (and surrounding area). Must work local to Austin.
Term: 3 months from first use date for video and perpetual for stills
—

If you are a fit and interested in submitting, please submit ASAP to submissions@vickyboonecasting.com by sending the following info:

*Name
*City you live in
*Contact Number
*Two recent photos
*Confirm you are avail for all the dates mentioned or list conflicts (3/23-3/24 and 3/26-3/30)
*Please use the subject line “SOCCER FAN”

Use: Video usage covers use in social media for 3 months from first air date, includes unlimited edits, lifts, and versions now known or hereafter developed. Usage also covers use of stills for use in: all digital media (including but not limited to: websites, emails, paid/organic social, banners, etc.), in-stores, collateral material, and OOH. Still usage is perpetual

We look forward to your submissions!

[We do not give permission to other casting sites to repost this casting call]

– Team VBC

items.text:
URGENT Casting Call for 5 Italian Nonnas – PAID 1-Day Coffee Commercial in LA
Hi everyone! We’re urgently looking to cast five older women to play Italian nonnas in a documentary-style commercial for a franchise coffee brand.

This is a sweet, natural, conversational role — NO FORMAL ACTING EXPERIENCE NEEDED.

📍 Location: Los Angeles County
📅 Shoot Date: Thursday, March 5, 2026
⏰ Approx. 12-hour day, call time TBD
💵 Paid gig - $300+, Travel WILL be covered
🍽 Food will be provided on set

What we’re looking for:
- Women 60 years or older
- Comfortable speaking Italian, you do NOT need to be fluent
- Just able to pronounce Italian clearly and read a few short lines

If you’re interested (or know someone who would be perfect!), please email:

📩 connect@intrasithcollective.com

Including:
-A recent photo of yourself that shows you from head to toe
-Your current hometown (For travel considerations)
-A contact phone number

Please reach out ASAP if you’re interested!

Thank you so much

## Seriale i produkcje telewizyjne

https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=112159

* **Kampania internetowa (Piotrków Trybunalski):** Poszukiwani są modele w wieku 35–45 lat.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=112182
* **Model plus-size (Wrocław):** Produkcja szuka mężczyzn (18–25 lat) do ciekawego projektu reklamowego.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=112178
* **Spoty social media (Warszawa):** Poszukiwani są statyści w wieku 20–50 lat.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=112160
* **Teledysk (Warszawa):** Produkcja szuka mężczyzn o sportowej sylwetce (20–50 lat).
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=112159

items.text:
**045  Mini serial  1940 – ‘’ 2 Oficer Waffen SS  -  mężczyzna  (casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje  mężczyzny w wieku 30 – 40 do roli oficera Waffen SS . Szukamy osoby bez zarostu oraz tatuaży na twarzy. Postać będzie mieć kwestie po niemiecku. Mile widziana osoba z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrza czy Katowic. Wystąpi w kilku odcinkach. Zdjęcia próbne realizujemy  w Gliwicach. Spotykamy się w wybrane niedziele z wyprzedzeniem 1 2 tygodniowym.  

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

 

.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

attachments.ocrText: May be a black-and-white image

‼️FINAL YEAR FILM AT THE UNIVERSITY OF SALFORD CASTING CALL‼️

The group creating their final film based on the Shakespeare play are CASTING!

Please see below for details of their production:

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of ‎text that says '‎Based on the beloved play by ملی Much WILLIAM SHAKESPEARE Ado CASTING CALL HERO Though soft-spoken, she is far from passive, she drives the central scheme of the story with warmth and playful intelligence. Her love for Claudio is sincere, and her loyalty to Beatrice is unwavering. Playing Age: 20-25 yrs Gender: Female Skills: Shakespeare Training (intermediate) Location: Capesthorne Hall Shoot Date: 16th 19th March 2026 Role is UNPAID. Transport expenses covered and catering is provided. For more information please contact: s.superfine@edu.salford.ac.uk Please include a headshot, availability, and a showreel/CV.‎'‎

May be an image of ‎text that says '‎Based on the beloved play by مالی Much WILLIAM SHAKESPEARE Ado CASTING CALL GRANDPARENT A warm and charismatic storyteller who serves as the narrative frame for the play. They have a subtle sparkle, a touch of mischief and magic, making their presence both comforting and captivating. Playing Age: 55-80 yrs Gender: Female or Male Location: Mossley, Manchester Shoot Date: 21st/22nd March 2026 Role is UNPAID. Transport expenses covered and catering is provided. For more information please contact: s.superfine@edu.salford.ac.uk Please include a headshot, availability, and a showreel/CV.‎'‎

May be an image of text that says 'Based on the beloved play by WILLIAM SHAKESPEARE Much Ado CASTING CALL CLAUDIO He is sincere in his love for Hero and genuinely well- meaning in his attempts to help Benedict and Beatrice, though his good intentions sometimes lead to emotional fallout. Playing Age: 23-30 yrs Gender: Male Skills: Shakespeare Training (intermediate) Location: Capesthorne Hall Shoot Date: 16th-18th/19th 16th-1 March 2026 Role is UNPAID. Transport expenses covered and catering is provided. For more information please contact: s.superfine@edu.salford.ac.uk Please include a headshot, availability, and a showreel/CV.'

items.text:
Hi everyone! Following our successful show in January, Between Acts is casting for our next show, Dream Roles! 

This will be people getting the chance to sing the songs of the characters they would love to play the most. 

If you’d like a frame of reference for what kind of songs you’ll be singing and what we provide you with after the shows, please head on over to our: 

Instagram: @betweenacts_

Please find all the details described below, we’d love to hear from you ❤️

https://linktr.ee/Betweenacts_?utm_source=ig&utm_medium=social&utm_content=link_in_bio&fbclid=PAZnRzaAQTxOhleHRuA2FlbQIxMQBzcnRjBmFwcF9pZA8xMjQwMjQ1NzQyODc0MTQAAacbfDGsfRJ5hN5KW8Q1G1_uErA5jwIKTbienmYUiauKWuzYzdsYCzCFS0eolQ_aem_gYY6xI_7LcRH9bbouOcPTA

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.

May be a graphic of text that says 'ABOUT We are looking looking for 3 singers in the North- West area to sing at our 'Dream Roles' cabaret night. Venue: Liverpool City Centre (tbc) Date: Friday 14th August 2026 Application deadline: 6PM, Monday 16th March 2026 Must be 18+ to apply. Profit share (travel and accommodation is not included) No experience necessary to apply. Must be based/from the North North-West West to apply'

May be a graphic of text that says 'HOW DO THE REHEARSALSWORK WORK? Rehearsals will mostly be done independently •There will be TWO In person rehearsals before performance. •The in person rehearsals will take place on Saturday 8th August (all day) AND Friday 14th August 10am 5pm (show day) In person rehearsals will take place in Liverpool City Centre (TBC) All singers will receive songs and harmonies with enough time to prepare before the the show. We will also have check-ins to make sure you're happy with the songs and will offer support if needed.'

May be an image of text that says 'AUDITION DETAILS TO APPLY Apply by 6PM, Monday 16th March Singers MUST fill out the form in our bio and send a Self-tape video of you Singing a Musical theatre song from a dream role you would love to play or from your dream musical you would love to be in. All auditionees will hear back from us with results via email within 2 weeks from the audition deadline. You must be 18+ to audition and have full availability on Saturday gth August and Friday 14th th August'

May be a graphic of text that says 'G01O THEATRE COMPANY If you have any questions Please contact us via: O Instagram DM: Betweenacts_ Email: il:betweenacts@outlook.com betweenacts Break a Leg! We can't wait to see you shine'

sharedPost.text:
Ok, so I have to be honest, the photos of me holding the award for best villain in Eastenders at the British Soap TV awards was Ai. But as the saying goes, “As a man thinketh in his heart so he becomes.” But your warm responses showed me who is out there rooting for me to succeed, which I am very touched by and even more determined to make this a reality, and now I have the best agent in my corner, I feel this will very much be the reality soon. In Gods Time. 

Here’s me playing Andy Hunter and Paul Truman in one of my favourite scenes from Eastenders. Let’s see how many of you recognise it. 

 #fypageシ #EastEnders #DreamBigWorkHard

Casting Call!
Join the cast of Scarlet’s independent project! 

A student short fantasy film about fairies, wizards and the hunt for lost knowledge!

-

-

Please note this is a Norfolk based film.

-

-

To Apply: Please send your CV and portfolio to the email address provided on the casting call.

-

-

Hello friends!

I'm helping my wonderful film student look for a last-minute replacement actor for his final Stream Project in the Foundation Program at the Vancouver Film School.

**MUST BE NON-UNION!**

***Do-yoon**** (Lead) Gender: Man Age: 20’s-30’s A tightly wound young man suffocating under the heavy weight of familial expectations. Beneath his outwardly blank and medicated exterior lies a fragile but defiant spirit, desperate for the right moment to shatter his constraints and release his true voice.*

This movie shoots on MARCH 9th and on MARCH 12th*.*

*If interested, please contact**** *****Ayden Rhee:** rhee.joon1@gmail.com

Thank you!

=)

items.text:
Your weekly international comedy meetup in the heart of Warsaw ❣️🤍
Live comedy. Real presence. Shared space.

We host a weekly English-language comedy night where people come together to laugh, listen, and connect in the same room.

Stand-up, improv, and occasional surprises, always live, always shaped by the people who show up.

It’s not about being the biggest or loudest show in town.
It’s about creating a space where comedy feels human again.
Each night is a little different.
Some shows lean more toward stand-up, others toward improv or playful experimentation. Sometimes something unexpected sneaks in. Nothing is repeated exactly the same way twice.

You’ll see a mix of bold local and international comedians, first-timers taking their first five minutes on stage, and more experienced performers trying new material in front of a real audience.

We’re not chasing trends.
We’re simply building something consistent, welcoming, and alive.
Hosted by Miguel Ferreira
A Brazilian comedian based in Warsaw, curious about people, culture, and what happens when strangers laugh together.

Why this exists
Because people miss being in rooms.
Because shared laughter still works.
Because live moments feel different when you’re actually there.
This isn’t background entertainment.
It’s something you’re part of.
Schedule
Happy Hour & Meet & Greet: 7:00 PM
Show starts: 8:00 PM
Location
Południk Zero
Wilcza 25, Warsaw
15 minutes from Pałac Kultury

🎟 Tickets:
https://fienta.com/2-0-comedy-show2-154404

🐾 Well-behaved pets are welcome.
🎤 Thinking about performing?

Each show keeps one spot open for a first-time performer.
Five minutes. One mic. A real audience.
📍 Impact Warsaw
Instagram: @impactwarsaw, @miguelatcomedy
Events: impactwarsaw.com/events
Inner Circle: https://t.me/+xJpuxiG5Au8xMmZk
If you’re curious, you’re welcome.
If you need a break from scrolling, come sit with us.
Just show up and see what happens.

Over a year pushing the boundaries of what live comedy can be.

NOWY PROJEKT - SZUKAMY DUBLERA AKTORA na 50 dni zdjęciowych!!!
Stawka za każdy dzień 250 zł 

Wymagane wymiary (mogą być minimalnie większe)

wzrost 181cm 
Klatka 113 cm
Pas 98 cm
Szyja 40 cm
barki 42cm
Głowa obwód 59 cm 
But 44 
-BRODA 
- wiek 40- 55 lat

Dodatkowe umiejętności / cechy szczególne:
- prawo jazdy kat. B, komfort za kierownicą
- sprawność fizyczna
- umiejętność pływania 

terminy:

okres zdjęciowy: 15.04 - 05.08

przerwa w zdjęciach: 26.06 - 22.07

Zgłoszenie musi zawierać:

- imię i nazwisko 
- wiek
- nr telefonu do kontaktu 
- dobrej jakości aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki (bez okularów, nakryć głowy, itp.)
- warto napisać kilka słów o sobie i dołączyć wizytówkę

Zgłoszenie należy przesłać na adres

impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com

🎥ABM Studio serdecznie zaprasza mieszkańców:

🟢Zielonej Góry

🔵Gorzowa Wielkopolskiego

realizowanej dla jednej z **największych platform streamingowych**. 🎞️

🔜Zdjęcia odbędą się 

**27, 28 i 29 marca**

w Kostrzynie nad Odrą.

‼️W tych dniach będziemy realizować zdjęcia do sceny dziejącej się na ukraińsko-polskim przejściu granicznym

(zakorkowanym przez ludzi uciekających przed wojną)

tuż po wkroczeniu Rosjan na Ukrainę.

⁉️**KOGO SZUKAMY?** 🔍

Panie w wieku 20+  50+

Panów w wieku 50+

oraz dzieci w wieku 2-14 lat

(zarówno z **Polski** jak i z **Ukrainy**)

🇵🇱 🇺🇦

**Formularz zgłoszeniowy**:

🇵🇱 po polsku - [https://form.jotform.com/260333686142354](https://form.jotform.com/260333686142354)

🇺🇦 po ukraińsku - [https://form.jotform.com/260403202473343](https://form.jotform.com/260403202473343)

👧👶dla dzieci - [https://form.jotform.com/260342789141357](https://form.jotform.com/260342789141357)

💶Stawka za dzień zdjęciowy w serialu to **130 zł** brutto.

Stawka rośnie w zależności od pory zdjęć (zdjęcia nocne 150% stawki),

ilości godzin na planie (powyżej 12 h dochodzą nadgodziny) pory rozpoczęcia / zakończenia  zdjęć, przydzielonej roli (epizod), obowiązkowej kontynuacji itd.

Jeżeli pojawisz się na planie razem ze swoim samochodem stawka rośnie do **200 zł** brutto.

🥪Produkcja na planie zapewnia ciepłe napoje i **catering**.

✅Chętnych zapraszamy do starannego **wypełnienia powyższego formularza**.

Spośród nadesłanych zgłoszeń będziemy wybierać wspólnie z pionem reżyserskim serialu szczęśliwców, których bezpośrednim telefonem zaprosimy na plan. Każda z wybranych osób dostanie szczegółowe informacje  - rola, godziny pracy, ostateczna stawka itd.

🟠Obszerniejszy opis pracy na planie zawarty jest w formularzach.

**ZAPRASZAMY !!**

**[PAID] 1st AC / Focus Puller Needed (Cantonese + English) — Indie Short Film (Toronto)**

Hi everyone! We’re looking for an experienced **1st AC / Focus Puller** for an **independent short film** shooting in **Toronto, ON (GTA)**.

**Shoot Dates:** **March 20–23, 2026** (one or multiple days within this window)
**Location:** **Toronto, Ontario (GTA)**
**Camera Systems:** **Sony FX6** and **ARRI Alexa Mini** (familiarity required)

**Requirements:**
* Proven experience as a **focus puller / 1st AC** on narrative/indie projects
* Comfortable with **FX6 + Alexa Mini** workflows and lens setups
* **Bilingual: Cantonese + English** (must)
* Reliable, professional, and able to work in a small, fast-moving crew

If interested, please email your **resume/credits**, **rate**, and any relevant links/reel to: **zoeyfilm77@gmail.com**
Thank you!

items.text:
We’re looking for a confident and engaging Interviewer to help us create compelling, people-focused content across events, street interviews, and studio recordings.

This role is ideal for someone who is naturally curious, passionate about conversations, and able to make people feel relaxed and confident on camera. You’ll be responsible for guiding interviews on a range of topics, creating a safe and comfortable environment for participants while maintaining energy, authenticity, and flow.

What we’re looking for:
* A natural communicator with strong listening skills
* Comfortable on camera with strong presence and warmth
* Ability to make interviewees feel at ease quickly
* Confident conducting interviews in public and studio settings
* Passion for storytelling and meaningful conversations

topComments.text: I have a lot of experience interviewing :) let’s connect
Hello, I’m interested. I have many years of experience and I am comfortable in front of camera.

items.text:
Casting! Trójmiasto!
Do głównej roli w autorskim musicalu "Mały książę - droga do zrozumienia" wystawianym 21 maja w Akademii Muzycznej w Gdańsku poszukujemy: 

Chłopca lub dziewczynki w wieku od 7-14 lat

Wymagania: 

- Dyspozycyjność (próby ustalane są z wyprzedzeniem) 

- Umiejętności wokalne (nawet na poziomie podstawowym) 

- Szybka nauka tekstu 

Zainteresowanych prosimy o kontakt w wiadomości prywatnej lub przez adres e-mail: teatrgarden@gmail.com. 

Występ płatny z możliwością przedłużenia współpracy. Próby będą odbywać się w Gdańsku. 

Zapewniamy przyjazną i bezpieczną atmosferę oraz zespół regularnie pracujący z dziećmi. 

W zgłoszeniu prosimy o podanie imienia, wieku, wzrostu oraz doświadczenia dziecka. Wysłanie zdjęcia oraz ewentualnych materiałów z występów.

Zainteresowanych prosimy o kontakt w wiadomości prywatnej lub przez adres e-mail: teatrgarden@gmail.com. 

Występ płatny z możliwością przedłużenia współpracy. Próby będą odbywać się w Gdańsku. 

Zapewniamy przyjazną i bezpieczną atmosferę oraz zespół regularnie pracujący z dziećmi. 

W zgłoszeniu prosimy o podanie imienia, wieku, wzrostu oraz doświadczenia dziecka. Wysłanie zdjęcia oraz ewentualnych materiałów z występów.
