items.text:
👋 Hallo zusammen,

ich bin **Existenzgründungsberater** und unterstütze Menschen dabei, **strukturiert und gefördert in die Selbstständigkeit** zu starten – je nach Situation z. B. über den **Gründungszuschuss der Agentur für Arbeit** oder über passende Fördermöglichkeiten im Zusammenhang mit dem **Jobcenter**.

Warum ich hier poste:
In vielen Gruppen rund um Selbstständigkeit sehe ich, dass viele mit einer guten Idee starten wollen, aber oft an denselben Punkten hängen:
* **Welche Förderung kommt überhaupt infrage?**
* **Welche Voraussetzungen müssen erfüllt sein?**
* **Wie gehe ich den Antrag richtig an?**
* **Wo fange ich am besten an, ohne Zeit zu verlieren?**

Genau dabei unterstütze ich.
Mein Fokus:

✅ Klarheit über Fördermöglichkeiten (Agentur für Arbeit / Jobcenter)
✅ Strukturierter Start in die Selbstständigkeit
✅ Unterstützung bei der Vorbereitung von Förderanträgen
✅ Orientierung zu Voraussetzungen, Ablauf und nächsten Schritten
Dein Vorteil (kurz auf den Punkt):

➡️ **mehr Klarheit** statt Informationschaos
➡️ **weniger Fehler** bei Vorbereitung und Antrag
➡️ **mehr Sicherheit** beim Start in die Selbstständigkeit
➡️ **schneller ins Handeln kommen** mit einem klaren Plan

Wenn du gerade über den Schritt in die Selbstständigkeit nachdenkst oder bereits gestartet bist und wissen möchtest, welche Möglichkeiten es für deinen Fall gibt, kannst du mir gern eine **PN** schreiben.
Auch Gruppenadmins oder Unternehmer:innen, die das Thema für ihre Community interessant finden, dürfen sich gerne melden. 🤝

Viele Grüße

items.text:
🎬 GREAT SCREEN ACTING ISN’T JUST ABOUT SHOWING EMOTION —

IT’S ABOUT GENERATING THE RIGHT ONE, TRUTHFULLY.

In this Masterclass, I take you inside and explore the directors process for working with actors for film and television.

Scripts are not instructions — they are blueprints, layered with meaning, intention and emotional truth that often sits well beneath the surface, and you must be able to read those hidden levels to respond to what the story truly requires.

As a director, I understand how to shape emotional flow across a scene and guide an actor to exactly what the story needs. 

As a screenwriter, I know how to infer the hidden emotional layers beneath the dialogue.

As an actor, you must use your own experience and perception to inhabit the character’s world fully then play your own internal emotional landscape — with timing, control and sensitivity — in tune with the story.

Then you your work becomes truthful, compelling and eminently castable.

This class will explore all of the above subjects and is open to anyone who is interested. 

📅 **Date & Time**
Wednesday 25th March 2026
7.30pm – 9.00pm UK Time 

🧾 **How to Book**
For all details including how to reserve your place-go to:
https://screen-acting.com/masterclass

And if you have any questions, just pop them in the comments.

items.text:
CREW CALL OUT, LONDON
We are putting together a short narrative two hander, a confrontation drama set in a flat, shooting end of April, with festival submission planned.

Professional and experienced actors and Director already on board. 

We are looking for:

Production Sound Mixer / Sound Recordist, must have own kit 

and

Gaffer with access to lighting kit suitable for an interior setup. 

This is an unpaid passion project with a focused, performance led team. 

Meals provided, London travel covered, full credit and footage for reels.

Shoot dates and further details available on request.

Please email Gabriellebroomes1@gmail.com with your role and examples of previous narrative work. 

Shares appreciated.

Student Film Casting London actors preferred.
Any ethnicity is welcome. Student film but director is experienced.

For both the Father and Son roles, please highlight any firearm training or police experience in your submission.

Film dates: 1 day between 12-15 March in London.

This is a compensation only job. Please refer to the contact details in the final image for submission.

items.text:
**CONTESTANTS WANTED FOR TV QUIZ RUN-THROUGH - Hammersmith (18+)**

Clapperboard Studios (based in London) are looking for contestants to take part in a run-through of an EXCITING NEW STRATEGIC QUIZ SHOW.

Do you back your own knowledge and instincts?

Are you open to taking risks?

Would you go against your team to benefit yourself?

If yes to any of this, we'd love to hear from you.

No experience required.

Date & Time: Friday 27th March, 10am-3pm

Location: Hammersmith, London

What you’ll get: £40 for taking part, refreshments throughout and the chance to play for the £100 prize pot

Please note: This is a development run-through and will not be televised.

Email to register your interest - casting@clapperboardstudios.tv

items.text:
📢 OPEN CALL FOR ARTISTS

Are you an artist in circus, music, dance, theater, or other performance arts? Join us for the second edition of the Buka Buskers Fest!

📍August 1 and 2, 2026, Piana degli Albanesi (PA) SICILY!

🎪 We invite performers from around the world to join us for a great celebration to support the local community and bring the historic Rrokat neighborhood back to life. We will create a shared experience of healing and beauty, get to know each other, and experiment with new artistic materials.

📝 APPLICATIONS: Submit your proposal by June 30th using the form:

👉🏻 [www.bukabuskers.com/open-call-2026/](https://www.bukabuskers.com/open-call-2026/)

Info: [bukabuskers@gmail.com](mailto:bukabuskers@gmail.com)

The Buka Buskers Fest is made possible thanks to the support of the Municipality of Piana degli Albanesi, conceived and directed by Federica Cuccia, and organized in collaboration with Giusi Maria Puglia and Matteo Lascari, Pro Loco Piana degli Albanesi, Qmedia, Cooperativa Controvento-SKLIZZA, and Radio In.
